dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3042 IS: Justice for America’s Veterans and Survivors Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES
form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to require the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to submit to Congress each year an annual report that contains data and information on the causes of deaths among veterans, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Justice for America’s Veterans and Survivors Act of 2025.

section.header: Department of Veterans Affairs annual report on causes of death among veterans

subsection.text: Subchaper II of chapter 5 of title 38, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following new section:

section.header: Annual report on causes of death among veterans

subsection.text: Not less frequently than once each year, the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Veterans’ Affairs of the Senate and the Committee on Veterans' Affairs of the House of Representatives an annual report that contains data and information on causes of death among veterans.
Each report submitted pursuant to subsection (a) shall include—

paragraph.text: for each veteran that died during the period covered by the report an identification of—

subparagraph.text: whether such veteran had a service-connected disability rated as total;
the secondary cause of death, if applicable; and

paragraph.text: for each primary cause of death identified pursuant to paragraph (1), a statement of the total number of veterans that died from such primary cause of death during the period covered by the report; and
for each manner of death identified pursuant to paragraph (1), a statement of the total number of veterans that died in such manner during the period covered by the report.

subsection.text: This section shall terminate on the date that is five years after the date of the enactment of the Justice for America’s Veterans and Survivors Act of 2025.
The table of sections at the beginning of chapter 5 of such title is amended by inserting after the item relating to section 533 the following new item:

toc.toc-entry: 534. Annual report on causes of death among veterans.
